case_title: MICROCOMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. VS EVERNET SYSTEMS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,351.60 FILED BY MICROCOMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EVERNET SYSTEMS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

CERTIFIED LETTER TO EVERNET SYSTEMS INC. RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF NOV-20-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MICROCOMPUTER SUPPORT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EVERNET SYSTEMS INC. $2,361.60 PRINCIPAL, $44.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,405.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT EVERNET SYSTEMS INC.
